skill.name: project-knowledge
skill.description: Loads project architecture, conventions, patterns, and gotchas from local knowledge files for a codebase.
skill.summary: Use local project knowledge to understand architecture and conventions before coding.
skill.author: Clouder0

security_audit.summary: The static findings are false positives after reviewing SKILL.md. The reported external command is a Markdown json code fence, and the weak cryptography matches are ordinary prose or sample JSON text, not cryptographic code. No prompt injection, network access, secret access, or executable behavior was found.

low_findings.title: False Positive: External Command Pattern
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged Ruby or shell backtick execution, but SKILL.md line 42 is a Markdown json fence for an example update payload. It does not execute commands or request shell access.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The line contains a fenced code block marker, not a shell command or Ruby backtick expression. The skill declares only the Read tool.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Pattern in Description
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged weak cryptography at SKILL.md line 3, but the line is frontmatter text describing project architecture knowledge. No cryptographic algorithm is configured or invoked.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The evidence is natural language metadata, not code. No encryption, hashing, or security-sensitive operation appears on the line.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Pattern in Usage Text
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged weak cryptography at SKILL.md line 36, but the line tells users to follow documented patterns and conventions. It contains no cryptographic implementation.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The line is an instructional sentence in Markdown. There is no algorithm name used in a cryptographic context.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Pattern in Example Payload
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged weak cryptography at SKILL.md line 43, but the line is an example JSON knowledge update containing the phrase Discovery description. It does not perform cryptography.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The pattern appears inside sample JSON content for documentation. No executable code or cryptographic API is present.

content.value_statement: Teams lose time when agents miss existing architecture and conventions. This skill guides Claude, Codex, and Claude Code to read local project knowledge before making changes.
actual_capabilities: Directs the assistant to read local architecture knowledge files when relevant.
Lists convention, pattern, and gotcha files for targeted project context.
Helps agents align implementation choices with existing project practices.
Provides a structured format for recording new project discoveries.
Works with read-only access through the declared Read tool.
limitations: It depends on the referenced knowledge files being present in the project.
It does not validate whether knowledge files are current or complete.
It does not generate architecture diagrams or source analysis by itself.
It only provides guidance; the assistant must still inspect relevant code.

use_cases.title: Start Work in an Existing Repository
use_cases.description: Load architecture and convention notes before changing code in an unfamiliar project.

use_cases.title: Prepare Consistent Implementation Plans
use_cases.description: Review documented patterns and gotchas before proposing technical changes.

use_cases.title: Capture New Project Discoveries
use_cases.description: Record confirmed or likely knowledge updates after completing investigation work.

prompt_templates.title: Load Project Context
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner prompt for starting a task.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use project-knowledge to read the relevant architecture and convention notes before you inspect the code.

prompt_templates.title: Check Existing Patterns
prompt_templates.prompt: Use project-knowledge to identify project patterns and gotchas related to this feature before proposing changes.

prompt_templates.title: Plan With Repository Knowledge
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced prompt for planning a change.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use project-knowledge, then produce an implementation plan that cites the relevant architecture, conventions, and known gotchas.

prompt_templates.title: Update Knowledge After Discovery
prompt_templates.prompt: After completing the task, summarize any new project knowledge using the skill update format with a confidence level.

output_examples.input: Use project-knowledge before changing the authentication flow.
output_examples.output: The assistant reviews architecture notes, convention guidance, and gotchas before identifying files to inspect.

output_examples.input: Check whether this service has established patterns for background jobs.
output_examples.output: The assistant reports the relevant documented pattern and calls out any known gotchas before planning code changes.

output_examples.input: We learned a new convention while fixing this bug.
output_examples.output: The assistant proposes a concise knowledge update with the category, discovery, and confidence level.

best_practices: Load only the knowledge files relevant to the current task.
Confirm important guidance against source code before making risky changes.
Record new discoveries with clear confidence levels after investigation.
anti_patterns: Do not treat stale knowledge files as more authoritative than current code.
Do not load every knowledge file when a narrow task needs only one area.
Do not add uncertain discoveries without marking the confidence level.

faq.question: What does this skill do?
faq.answer: It tells the assistant where to find local project architecture, conventions, patterns, and gotchas.

faq.question: Does it run commands?
faq.answer: No. The skill declares only the Read tool and provides documentation guidance.

faq.question: Does it include the knowledge files?
faq.answer: No. It references local knowledge files that must exist in the project using the skill.

faq.question: Can it update project knowledge automatically?
faq.answer: It provides an update format, but the surrounding workflow must handle merging those updates.

faq.question: Is this useful for new contributors?
faq.answer: Yes. It helps new contributors find key architecture and convention notes quickly.

faq.question: Which assistants can use it?
faq.answer: The report lists compatibility with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
